result.stdout:
Usage: mdtox <input-file> [-o|--output <output-path>] [options]
       mdtox render-svg <input.svg> -o output.png     (SVG rasterization)
       mdtox --config .mdtox.json                     (batch mode)
       cat file.md | mdtox --format pdf -o out.pdf    (stdin mode)
       mdtox file.md --format pdf --stdout > out.pdf  (stdout mode)
       mdtox mcp                                      (MCP server mode)

Arguments:
  <input-file>    Path to the Markdown file to convert (or pipe via stdin)

Subcommands:
  mcp             Start MCP server (stdio transport)
  render-svg      Convert SVG to raster image (PNG, JPEG, WebP)

render-svg Options:
  <input.svg>      Path to SVG file (or pipe via stdin)
  -o, --output     Output file path (required unless --stdout)
  --format <fmt>   Output format: png (default), jpeg, webp
  --quality <n>    Image quality 0-100 (JPEG/WebP only)
  --width <px>     Output width in CSS pixels
  --height <px>    Output height in CSS pixels
  --scale <factor> Device scale factor (e.g. 2.0 for retina)
  --background <c> CSS background color (default: transparent)
  --json           Output result as JSON
  --stdout         Write image bytes to stdout

Options:
  -o, --output    Output file path (default: same name as input with .pdf extension)
                  Supported formats: pdf, html, docx, pptx
                  When input is .docx, converts to Markdown (reverse conversion)
  --stdout        Write output to stdout (for piping). Cannot be used with --json.
  --page-numbers  Include page numbers in PDF footer
  --landscape     Use landscape orientation
  --toc           Generate table of contents
  --cover         Include cover page
  --author <name> Author name for cover page
  --date <date>   Date for cover page (default: today)
  --no-mermaid    Disable Mermaid diagram rendering
  --theme <name>  Apply a visual theme. Accepts:
                  - Built-in name (corporate, technical, etc.)
                  - JSON file path (.theme.json)
                  - YAML file path (.theme.yaml, .theme.yml)
  --extract-theme Extract theme from a .docx template to JSON
  --list-themes   List all available themes and exit
  --theme-catalog Generate a PDF catalog previewing all available themes
  --images <mode> Image embedding mode: disabled (default), inline, appendix
                  inline: embed images at full page width, preserving aspect ratio
                  appendix: collect images at document end with bidirectional links
  --allow-remote-images  Download remote images without interactive consent
  --watch         Watch input file for changes and re-convert on save
  --config <path> Load .mdtox.json project config for batch conversion
  --dry-run       Preview batch files without converting (use with --config)
  --json          Output results as JSON (for agent consumption)
  --format <fmt>  Output format (pdf, html, docx, pptx) -- overrides extension detection
  -h, --help      Show help
  --version       Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: mdtox render-svg <input.svg> [-o output.png] [options]
       cat file.svg | mdtox render-svg --format png -o out.png
       mdtox render-svg file.svg --format png --stdout > out.png

Options:
  -o, --output     Output file path
  --format <fmt>   Output format: png (default), jpeg, webp
  --quality <n>    Image quality 0-100 (JPEG/WebP only)
  --width <px>     Output width in CSS pixels
  --height <px>    Output height in CSS pixels
  --scale <factor> Device scale factor (default: 1.0)
  --background <c> CSS background color (default: transparent)
  --json           Output result as JSON
  --stdout         Write image bytes to stdout
  -h, --help       Show this help
